news.t: Goldman Sachs is building on the disruptive investing theme with a trio of new ETFs

holdings.infoBox: GDOC is an equity ETF with a total of 42 individual holdings. The top holdings are Eli Lilly and Company stock at 13.57%, Johnson & Johnson at 8.60%, Merck & Co. at 6.75%, Guardant Health at 5.40%, and AstraZeneca at 4.68%.

overview.description: The Future Health Care Equity ETF (GDOC) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in health care equity. The fund is actively managed to provide exposure to equities of companies that are driving innovation in healthcare globally. GDOC was launched on Nov 9, 2021 and is issued by Goldman Sachs.

data.title: Goldman Sachs is building on the disruptive investing theme with a trio of new ETFs
data.text: Goldman Sachs Group is offering investors new ways to seek equity gains from disruptive companies, with its asset management business launching three exchange-traded funds focused on secular growth tr...
